top.title: Trump says he called off new Iran attack at request of Gulf states
top.summary: The US president says he is holding off on a US attack planned for Tuesday as "serious negotiations are now taking place".

top.title: Teen suspects fatally shoot three in suspected hate crime at San Diego mosque
top.summary: The alleged attackers were aged 17 and 18 and one left a note containing "generalised hate rhetoric", investigators say.

top.title: At least 118 dead in Ebola outbreak in DR Congo, official says
top.summary: The World Health Organization (WHO) has declared the outbreak an international emergency.

top.title: Robo-top: The machines that could make your next t-shirt
top.summary: Most clothes are made in Asia, but new machines could bring some of that work back to the West.

top.title: Satellites and AI used to track UK hedgehogs in bid to slow decline
top.summary: Researchers hope the project will also help to identify barriers preventing hedgehogs from finding food and mates in the wild.

top.title: Musk loses OpenAI court battle after jury finds he waited too long to sue
top.summary: Jurors spent weeks hearing about Musk's claim that Altman had "stolen a charity."

title.#text: LG will release the first 1000Hz, 1080p gaming monitor this year
Volvo teases a new affordable EV to replace discontinued EX30
PlayStation exclusives aren’t coming to PC anymore
